title: Luciano Charlita De Freitas
gist: An author profile for a Brasilia-based World Bank Senior Specialist in Digital Transformation and AI who coordinates digital and AI investment projects, signaling the Bank's active digital-transformation agenda in Brazil and Latin America.

insights.claim: The World Bank runs investment projects and analytical products on digital transformation and AI coordinated from Brasilia, spanning topics from cloud economics to Amazon broadband connectivity and digital-trust reforms in Brazil.
insights.speaker: World Bank Blogs
insights.so_what: Confirms the World Bank is actively financing and researching digital and AI infrastructure in Brazil, a demand signal for connectivity and data-infrastructure providers.
insights.locator: Luciano holds a PhD in Economics
